Key Step / Check: Confirm fence type, location, included components, height, finish and any risk flags before work starts.
Required Photo Evidence: Not required unless site notes need supporting photos.
Blocking Rule: Do not start site work until setup is complete.

Key Step / Check: Photograph existing conditions and protect client/neighbour property, access routes, gardens, paving, walls, windows and services.
Required Photo Evidence: Existing site condition; protected surfaces/areas; access route; material storage area.
Blocking Rule: Do not demolish, dig or install until property protection and existing condition photos are complete.

Key Step / Check: Confirm fence line, start/end points, corners/returns, finished height, facing direction, post spacing and gate openings where relevant.
Required Photo Evidence: Stringline; start/end points; corners/returns; height reference; gate opening if included.
Blocking Rule: Do not dig post holes if boundary, set-out, height or gate opening is unclear or disputed.

Key Step / Check: Remove existing fence cleanly, manage waste, expose the fence line and record unexpected issues such as roots, services, concrete or damage.
Required Photo Evidence: Before removal; after removal; waste/control area; unexpected issues if found.
Blocking Rule: Block post holes if removal exposes services, boundary issues, unstable ground or damage needing review.

Key Step / Check: Confirm post-hole location, spacing, depth, diameter, alignment, gate post locations and ground condition before posts are set.
Required Photo Evidence: Holes along stringline; representative depth/diameter with tape; corner/end/gate post holes; obstructions if any.
Blocking Rule: Do not concrete posts until hole position, depth and spacing are approved.

Key Step / Check: Check posts are plumb, aligned, correctly spaced, set to suitable height and concreted securely.
Required Photo Evidence: Posts along stringline; plumb/level checks; concrete around posts; corner/end/gate posts.
Blocking Rule: Do not install rails if posts are out of plumb, misaligned, loose, incorrectly spaced or not ready.

Key Step / Check: Confirm rails are straight, correctly positioned, securely fixed and ready for palings or pickets. Check plinth where included.
Required Photo Evidence: Rails before cladding; fixing detail; rail heights; plinth board if included; gate frame if included.
Blocking Rule: Do not install palings or pickets until rail/frame/plinth work is approved.

Key Step / Check: Check paling facing, overlap/layout, top and bottom lines, fixing pattern, damaged palings, corners and returns.
Required Photo Evidence: First section; overlap/detail; fixing pattern; completed representative section; corners/returns.
Blocking Rule: Do not cap or finalise if paling line, overlap, fixings or damaged materials remain unresolved.

Key Step / Check: Confirm capping is straight, securely fixed, cleanly joined and finished neatly at ends and returns.
Required Photo Evidence: Capping line; joins/mitres; ends/returns; exposed fixing detail where relevant.
Blocking Rule: Final completion blocked if capping is loose, visibly poor or incomplete.

Key Step / Check: Approve picket spacing, height, profile/top line, bottom clearance and end spacing before full installation.
Required Photo Evidence: First section; picket spacing sample; height reference; top line/profile; end detail.
Blocking Rule: Do not continue full picket installation until first section layout is approved.

Key Step / Check: Check pickets are plumb, consistently spaced, neatly fixed and visually aligned across the full fence.
Required Photo Evidence: Progress photos; spacing detail; fixing detail; ends/corners/returns; finished elevation.
Blocking Rule: Final completion blocked if picket spacing, line, fixings or damaged materials remain unresolved.

Key Step / Check: Check gate posts, frame, hinges, latch, clearances, swing direction and operation.
Required Photo Evidence: Gate opening; gate posts; hinges; latch; gate open and closed; clearances.
Blocking Rule: Final completion blocked if gate does not operate cleanly or hardware is incomplete.

Key Step / Check: Confirm product, surface prep, even application, cut-end treatment and protection of surrounding surfaces.
Required Photo Evidence: Product used; surface before coating; coated sections; touch-ups; protected adjacent surfaces.
Blocking Rule: Final completion blocked if finish is incomplete, wrong product used or adjacent surfaces are contaminated.

Key Step / Check: Confirm fence is straight, secure, cleanly finished, gates operate, site is clean, waste removed and scope is complete.
Required Photo Evidence: Full fence from both ends; front/back faces where accessible; gates; corners/returns; cleaned work area.
Blocking Rule: Cannot approve run until all applicable sections are cleared or explicitly supervisor-approved.
